The RPI Service Promise

We're Your People.TM

Three ways we show up for you — on day one, when something breaks, and when you haven't called.
🏁
Pillar 1

NewBiz Process

When you first become a client.

  • Discovery meeting — we listen first, quote second
  • Analysis + Recommendations meeting
  • Application, underwriting, issue
  • Welcome kit + team intro
  • Activation + ProDashX access
📞
Pillar 2

Reactive Service

When you call us with something.

  • Service team on the phone, not voicemail
  • Same-day triage, 48-hr resolution target
  • Carrier coordination — we handle the back-and-forth
  • Documentation sent to ACF automatically
  • Follow-up until you're satisfied
📡
Pillar 3

Proactive Service Model™

When you haven't called — but something needs attention.

  • RMD tracking + notifications before deadlines
  • AEP readiness every Oct 1 for Medicare clients
  • Rate-change flagging on CDs, annuities, life policies
  • Beneficiary drift audits
  • Annual review meetings scheduled by us
“Most firms answer when you call. We call before you would have.”
— The RPI Service Promise

Your team is ready when you need them.

Call the RPI Service Center anytime. A real person, on your team, who knows you.

(888) 620-8587
